2606.11074.title: Modeling Complex Behaviors: Multi-Personality Composition and Dynamic Switching in Vision-Language Models
2606.11074.paper_summary: With the widespread deployment of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in social interaction, understanding and controlling their behavior under complex personality conditions is essential. This paper introduces explicit personality conditioning and establishes a systematic evaluation framework encompassing single-personality induction, multi-personality induction, and personality switching. Experiments show that personality induction improves image captioning performance but can impair performance on tasks requiring precise reasoning, such as visual question answering (VQA). Balancing and residual effects are observed during multi-trait composition and dynamic switching, indicating that model behavior is co-modulated by both previous and current personality constraints. Existing prompt-based personality induction methods show limited transferability to multimodal settings. Our work reveals the dynamic and complex nature of personality modeling in MLLMs and underscores the need for robust, tailored methods for personality induction and evaluation. The code will be released when the paper is accepted.
2606.11074.paper_summary_zh: 隨著多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在社交互動中的廣泛應用，理解和控制它們在複雜人格條件下的行為變得至關重要。這篇論文介紹了明確的人格條件設定，並建立了一個系統的評估框架，涵蓋單一人格引導、多重人格引導和人格切換。實驗顯示，人格引導提高了圖像標題生成的表現，但可能會損害在需要精確推理的任務上的表現，例如視覺問題回答（VQA）。在多特徵組合和動態切換過程中觀察到平衡和殘留效應，這表明模型行為受到先前和當前人格約束的共同調節。現有的基於提示的人格引導方法在多模態環境中顯示出有限的可轉移性。我們的工作揭示了MLLMs中人格建模的動態和複雜性，並強調了對於人格引導和評估的穩健、量身定制的方法的需求。當論文被接受時，代碼將會發布。
2606.11074.author: Peiqi Jia et.al.
2606.11074.authors: Peiqi Jia, Haonan Jia, Ziqi Miao, Linkang Du, Yuntao Wang, Zhou Su
